modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be poor spelling and grammar and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need a free program to keep my computer clean.

full_description_text: I want to keep my computer clean. Can you suggest a free program? I need something good to use. Just looking for a recommendation.
short_description: Need a free program to keep my computer clean.
description: I want to keep my computer clean. Can you suggest a free program? I need something good to use. Just looking for a recommendation.
